zh.lifeSummary: 當Sancha de Ayala於1360年6月1日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，她的父親Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor31歲，母親Ines Alfonso de Ayala33歲。她與Walter Blount結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1418年1月8日在英國諾廷加姆爾內瓦可享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾內瓦可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sancha de Ayala于1360年6月1日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，她的父亲Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor31岁，母亲Ines Alfonso de Ayala33岁。她与Walter Blount结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1418年1月8日在英国諾廷加姆爾內瓦可享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾內瓦可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ayala
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Miguel, Pedro, Francisco, Raul, Jorge, Rafael.
Basque: Castilianized form of Aiala, habitational or topographic name from ai ‘slope, hillside’ + al(h)a ‘pasture’.

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sancha de Ayala was born on 1 June 1360, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, her father, Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor, was 31 and her mother, Ines Alfonso de Ayala, was 33. She married Walter Blount. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 January 1418, in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sancha de Ayala est née le 1 juin 1360, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ines Alfonso de Ayala, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Blount. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1418, à Newark, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Newark, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Malpica de Tajo, Toledo, Castilla-La Man: Malpica de Tajo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Sancha de Ayala am 1. Juni 1360 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor 31 und ihre Mutter Ines Alfonso de Ayala 33. Sie hat Walter Blount geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Januar 1418 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sancha de Ayala è nata il il 1 giugno 1360 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, sua padre, Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Ines Alfonso de Ayala, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Walter Blount. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1418, nel Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sancha de Ayalaが1360年6月1日にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayorは31歳，母Ines Alfonso de Ayalaは33歳であった。Walter Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1418年1月8日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルクで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルクにて埋葬された。

ko.Malpica de Tajo, Toledo, Castilla-La Man: 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 맬피카 데 타조
ko.lifeSummary: Sancha de Ayala(이)가 1360년 6월 1일 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ines Alfonso de Ayala(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Walter Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1418년 1월 8일 영국 노틴그함실르 뉴아르크에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 뉴아르크에 묻혔다.

pt.Malpica de Tajo, Toledo, Castilla-La Man: Malpica de Tajo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sancha de Ayala nasceu em 1 de junho de 1360, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ines Alfonso de Ayala, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Blount. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1418, em Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Malpica de Tajo, Toledo, Castilla-La Man: Malpica de Tajo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spania

ru.Malpica de Tajo, Toledo, Castilla-La Man: малпика де таджо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sancha de Ayala родилась 1 июня 1360 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, её отцу по имени Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ines Alfonso de Ayala, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Blount. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 января 1418 г. в местности нюарк, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности нюарк, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sancha de Ayala nació el 1 de junio de 1360, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Diego Gómez de Toledo Señor de Casarrubios del monte, Notario y Alcalde Mayor, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ines Alfonso de Ayala, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Walter Blount. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1418, en Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
